scenario.name: UAC inbound to IVR, DTMF '1' to support
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: tester <sip:tester@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:tester@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=tester 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: tester <sip:tester@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Content-Length: 0

INFO sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: tester <sip:tester@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INFO Content-Type: application/dtmf-relay Content-Length: [len]
Signal=1 Duration=160

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: tester <sip:tester@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 BYE Content-Length: 0
